summary: Iteration 117 - ARS 1000 Smart Recommendations & PDF Generation Testing COMPLETE. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. All 5 new endpoints working: POST /api/ars1000/agroforesterie/recommandations (smart tree recommendations from raw data), GET /api/ars1000/agroforesterie/recommandations/farmer/{farmer_id} (farmer-specific recommendations), GET /api/ars1000/pdf/pdc/{pdc_id} (10-page PDC PDF), GET /api/ars1000/pdf/rapport-essai/{lot_id} (ARS 1000-2 test report PDF), GET /api/ars1000/pdf/tracabilite/{lot_id} (traceability sheet PDF). Frontend: All buttons verified - PDF download buttons in PDC tab and Lots tab, Recommandations intelligentes button in Agent Visite PDC Inventaire Arbres step.
critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation uses ReportLab library with proper A4 formatting and French content
PDC PDF generates 10 pages covering: Cover, Identification, Ménage, Parcelles, Arbres d'Ombrage, Matériel, Stratégie, Conformité, Signatures
Rapport d'Essai PDF includes all ARS 1000-2 quality control thresholds (humidity 8%, sieving 1.5%, foreign bodies 0.75%)
Smart recommendations system correctly identifies non-conformant parcels and suggests specific species with quantities
Recommendations include plantation plan with nursery duration and reproduction method
All PDF endpoints return StreamingResponse with proper content-type and content-disposition headers
Frontend buttons correctly integrated with data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test PDC and Lot created during backend tests for PDF generation verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: ARS 1000 PDF generation and smart recommendations fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/ars1000/pdf/pdc/{pdc_id} (10-page PDF), GET /api/ars1000/pdf/rapport-essai/{lot_id}, GET /api/ars1000/pdf/tracabilite/{lot_id}, POST /api/ars1000/agroforesterie/recommandations, GET /api/ars1000/agroforesterie/recommandations/farmer/{farmer_id}. Frontend: PDF buttons in ARS1000Dashboard (PDC tab line ~293, Lots tab lines ~442-446), Recommandations button in AgentVisitePDC (line ~486-495), PDF download in ResumeStep (line ~774-782).

backend_apis: POST /api/ars1000/agroforesterie/recommandations (raw data) - PASSED: Returns diagnostic, recommendations, plan_plantation, projection
POST /api/ars1000/agroforesterie/recommandations (conformant data) - PASSED: High score for conformant parcels
GET /api/ars1000/agroforesterie/recommandations/farmer/{farmer_id} - PASSED: Returns farmer-specific recommendations with pdc_id
GET /api/ars1000/pdf/pdc/{pdc_id} - PASSED: Returns valid PDF (application/pdf, %PDF header, >5KB)
GET /api/ars1000/pdf/rapport-essai/{lot_id} - PASSED: Returns valid PDF with Rapport_Essai filename
GET /api/ars1000/pdf/tracabilite/{lot_id} - PASSED: Returns valid PDF with Tracabilite filename
PDF endpoints without auth - PASSED: Returns 401/403
Recommandations endpoints without auth - PASSED: Returns 401/403
frontend_ui: ARS1000Dashboard PDC tab - PASSED: PDF download buttons visible for each PDC
ARS1000Dashboard Lots tab - PASSED: Rapport and Traçabilité download buttons visible for each lot
AgentVisitePDC Inventaire Arbres step - PASSED: Recommandations intelligentes button visible
AgentVisitePDC Résumé step - PASSED: PDF download button appears after PDC is saved (conditional rendering)

sections: Résultats contrôles (humidité, tamisage, corps étrangers, épreuve coupe, fermentation)
